name: Pizza Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar pizza sauce (commercial or your own)
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the ingredients in order listed above in a casserole dish.
2. Cover with plastic wrap and microwave for 5 minutes on high.
3. Remove from microwave, stir gently, replace, and microwave again for another 5 minutes on high.
4. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese liberally on top and let stand until the cheese melts.
Note: This recipe can also be prepared in an oven by cooking the noodles first and omitting water. Cook at 350°F (175°C) until bubbly, about 40 minutes.
